title: Coverage Status
description: v1. Exactly the 6 coverage statuses of PRD section 12; each result carries exactly one. The companion data-completeness status (exactly the 3 PRD section 12 values) is in $defs/data_completeness. AI confidence scores must never substitute for legal-review status.

data_completeness.title: Data Completeness Status
data_completeness.description: Each result must also carry exactly one data-completeness status (PRD section 12).
